text:
Once upon a time in a tiny town called Willow Creek there lived a girl named Poppy.

Poppy loved dreams more than anything else. She saw a moonlit owl one autumn night fluttering down feathers grey. She chased it deep under leaves.

Sometimes dreams come true. One lazy afternoon, Poppy fancied herself a pirate. She wore a tricorn cap. Skull tattoos adorned her chin.

With a captain's coat.

They say mapmakers dream roads.

But pirates find trails.

Later nights were calm. Stars shone.

One quiet afternoon. Poppy saw mermaids.

With scales silver. Eyes blue.

Just waves.

She smiled. They kissed.
